display_text: Echo Sabre, Cost: 2700: Provides an Echo Strike passive, causing melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession, applying a 100% movement slow for 0.8 seconds on the first strike. Offers burst damage and a reliable slow for ganking and chasing. Stats: CD: 5s, Slow: 100% for 0.8s.
search_text: double attack item, melee double hit, slow on hit, echo strike, melee attack modifier, attack twice, proc slow, ganking item, chase item, burst damage, echo sabre, echo

display_text: Echo Sabre, Cost: 2700: Provides +15 Strength, +20 Damage, and +1.75 Mana Regeneration. A balanced mid-game item offering survivability, right-click damage, and mana sustain. Stats: STR: +15, DMG: +20, MP Regen: +1.75.
search_text: echo sabre stats, strength damage mana regen, melee stats, mid game stats, strength item, mana regen item, damage item, Echo Sabre

display_text: Echo Sabre, Cost: 2700: Enhances melee heroes with instant double-hit burst and a potent movement slow for initiation and lockdown. The guaranteed slow aids in catching mobile targets and securing follow-up attacks or spells for your team.
search_text: team fight melee, initiation slow, lockdown item, catch tool, slow utility, melee support, chase lockdown, Echo Sabre

display_text: Echo Sabre, Cost: 2700: Ideal for strength-based melee cores who benefit from health, damage, and mana, and whose kits synergize with the double-attack slow for locking down targets (e.g., Sven, Tiny, Slardar). The slow helps secure stuns and combos.
search_text: strength melee core, sven item, tiny item, slardar item, double hit slow, proc synergy, strength carry, mana regen core, Echo Sabre

display_text: Echo Sabre, Cost: 2700: The instant slow combats heroes reliant on high mobility and positioning to escape. It provides a soft counter to elusive, kite-focused heroes by applying a near-root effect, forcing them to use mobility spells defensively.
search_text: counter mobility, vs mobility, vs kite, slow counter, chase counter, lock down mobile hero, vs escape, Echo Sabre
